title: Proc Call
description: Create a Proc object and demonstrate how to execute it using the .call method.
problemStatement:
Stored logic! Create a `Proc` named `hi` that prints `"Hi!"`. Execute it using the `.call` method.

**Requirement:** Use the `Proc.new` syntax.
hints: A `Proc` object is a saved block of code that can be stored in a variable and called later.
